label: Midair - build & run
command: bash -c './mongo.sh midair && make flavour=midair && (killall isabelle-core-midair || true) && BINARY=generated/midair/target/debug/isabelle-core-midair ./run.sh --data-path ./data-midair --database midair --cookie-http-insecure'

label: IntraNet - build & run
